title: Habenaria quinqueseta
taxonomy: Habenaria quinqueseta is a species within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This genus is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Orchideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into several subtribes, including the Habenariinae subtribe. Habenaria quinqueseta is native to tropical and subtropical regions. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, it is a flowering plant with unique characteristics.
